input.question: Show the grade distribution for each department

payload.question: Show the grade distribution for each department

output.sql:
WITH dept_grade_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.name AS department_name,
    e.grade AS grade,
    COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM enrollments e
  JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
  JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.name, e.grade
)
SELECT
  department_name,
  grade,
  count,
  ROUND(100.0 * count / SUM(count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_name), 2) AS pct
FROM dept_grade_counts
ORDER BY department_name, grade;

visualization.title: Grade distribution by department (proportion by grade)

payload.sql:
WITH dept_grade_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.name AS department_name,
    e.grade AS grade,
    COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM enrollments e
  JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
  JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.name, e.grade
)
SELECT
  department_name,
  grade,
  count,
  ROUND(100.0 * count / SUM(count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_name), 2) AS pct
FROM dept_grade_counts
ORDER BY department_name, grade;
